name: 48 Zodiac Cyber Reader
description: Provides fast, secure analysis of 48 Zodiac zones and detailed dual compatibility scores without requiring API keys or local system access. (48星区配对与性格解析专属大模型插件：零越权、无密钥、全安全)
author: Miaozai Studio

tools.name: get_zone_details
tools.description: 获取指定 48 星区的单人性格与深层人格解析。The 'sign' parameter must be the specific 48-Zodiac ID (e.g., taurus2, aries1).

tools.name: get_pairing_details
tools.description: 获取两个 48 星区的深度宿命感情配对报告、打分及相处避坑指南。Parameters 'sign1' and 'sign2' must be the specific 48-Zodiac IDs.
